name: ndss-skills
description: A 12-skill depth pack for NDSS submissions: venue fit, dual-cycle planning, HotCRP submission audit, two-round review with early reject and rebuttal, Accept/Minor/Major-Revision handling, ethics and disclosure, artifact evaluation, reproducibility, supplementary material, writing style, related work, experiments, and camera-ready for the Internet Society's open-access proceedings. Grounded in the official NDSS 2027 Call for Papers, Call for Artifacts, HotCRP cycle site, and Internet Society announcements checked on 2026-07-08.
